title: phlox carolina var. ovata
intro: Phlox carolina var. ovata, also known as Carolina phlox, is a flowering plant species native to North America, characterized by its pink, purple, or white flowers and its use in herbal medicine. The plant has been used to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phlox carolina var. ovata include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Phlox carolina var. ovata include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
